question: Which income group appears to make up the largest share of customers in the most recent year shown?

options.A: The red segment (Low income) accounts for the largest share.
options.B: The purple segment (High income) accounts for the largest share.
options.C: The green segment (Middle income) accounts for the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which income group has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
